underlying_goal: User wanted to use the /oh-my-claudecode:team slash command to spawn coordinated agents for a shared task, but didn't provide the required arguments
friction_detail: The slash command was invoked without arguments, and instead of asking the user what they wanted, Claude started autonomously exploring the codebase until the user interrupted.
brief_summary: User invoked a team command without arguments; Claude explored the codebase autonomously instead of clarifying the request, and the user interrupted the session.
